title: uncaria domatiifera
intro: Uncaria domatiifera, also known as Gacutir or Katira, is a type of climbing vine native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia, Malaysia, and the Philippines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Uncaria domatiifera include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
